mainEntity.name: How much does AEO cost for Houston law firms?
mainEntity.text: How much does AEO cost for Houston law firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO for Houston firms costs $2K-$10K initially (audit/schema/dev), $500-$2K/month maintenance, varying by agency vs. in-house.[1][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: DIY AEO is low-cost (tools free), but agencies charge for Phoenix/Houston audits. ROI from leads justifies; compare to SEO fees. Budget for ongoing updates—opponents track your visibility gains, but costs stay internal.[1]

name: AEO Costs for Houston Lawyers
description: AEO for Houston firms costs $2K-$10K initially (audit/schema/dev), $500-$2K/month maintenance, varying by agency vs. in-house.[1][4]
